results.rendered_html: 2. śriṣ (prob. a collateral form of √2. śliṣ), in śreṣāma (accord to,  Sāy. ) = śleṣayema, ‘may we connect or compose’,  RV. iv, 43, 1 , and ā-śliṣat = ā-śliṣṭaṃ mā bhūt, ‘let it not be left on the ground’,  ib.  i, 162, 11  (cf. abhi-śriṣ, doṣaṇiśriṣ, hṛdaya-śriṣ, ā-śreṣa, saṃ-śreṣaṇi).

results.rendered_html:
1. √śriṣ , śreṣati (dāhe)  DHĀTUP. 17,51 . = śliṣ verbinden, zusammenfügen: kasyemāṃ hṛdi śreṣāma suṣṭutim  ṚV. 4,43,1 .
— Vgl. śreṣman in a˚.
— abhi verbinden: ṛte cidabhiśriṣaḥ (infin.)  ṚV. 8,1,12 . [Page7-0362]
— ā s. āśreṣa.
— sam s. saṃśreṣiṇa.
